tweet.content: Introducing your agent and the all-new Gemini Omni model in Google Flow. #GoogleIO ✨ Think of your agent as a creative partner. It reasons through complex tasks and helps you brainstorm, create, and edit, all while under your direction. ⚡ Gemini Omni is where Gemini's intelligence meets our generative media models. Think of it as Nano Banana but for video. It is a major leap forward in world understanding, multimodality, and editing. Try all the latest Google Flow updates from I/O today at flow.google.

summary: Google Flow在Google IO 2026推出Agent创意伙伴和全新的Gemini Omni多模态模型
